'''shachofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrophysicist|iatrophysicist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrophysicist|iatrophysicist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shachofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæchefeth|shæchefeth]] || [[word:shæchefej|shæchefej]] || [[word:shæchefesh|shæchefesh]] || [[word:shæchefe|shæchefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shachochofoth|shachochofoth]] || [[word:shachochofoj|shachochofoj]] || [[word:shachochofosh|shachochofosh]] || [[word:shachochofo|shachochofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachofoth|shachofoth]] || [[word:shachofoj|shachofoj]] || [[word:shachofosh|shachofosh]] || [[word:shachofo|shachofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shachoffoth|shachoffoth]] || [[word:shachoffoj|shachoffoj]] || [[word:shachoffosh|shachoffosh]] || [[word:shachoffof|shachoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shachofotho|shachofotho]] || [[word:shachofojo|shachofojo]] || [[word:shachofosho|shachofosho]] || [[word:shachofoko|shachofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shachofoth|shachofoth]] || [[word:shachofoj|shachofoj]] || [[word:shachofosh|shachofosh]] || [[word:shachofo|shachofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shachofothol|shachofothol]] || [[word:shachofojol|shachofojol]] || [[word:shachofoshol|shachofoshol]] || [[word:shachofokol|shachofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shachofothotho|shachofothotho]] || [[word:shachofojojo|shachofojojo]] || [[word:shachofoshosho|shachofoshosho]] || [[word:shachofoko|shachofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shachofothon|shachofothon]] || [[word:shachofojon|shachofojon]] || [[word:shachofoshon|shachofoshon]] || [[word:shachofokon|shachofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shachofothoro|shachofothoro]] || [[word:shachofojoro|shachofojoro]] || [[word:shachofoshoro|shachofoshoro]] || [[word:shachofokoro|shachofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
